sizing_rule.note: Position sizing algorithm that reduces or eliminates positions when drawdown exceeds 2 standard deviations. Combines drawdown scaling with Kelly fractional approach (0.5 fractional Kelly applied). Only takes trades when market conditions and statistical risk measures are favorable (drawdown < 2σ, expected return > +1.5σ from historical mean).

source_rule_text: A trader should implement a position-sizing algorithm to avoid taking positions when market conditions or statistical risk measures indicate the trade should not be taken, rather than relying on signal generation alone.
